Skip to contents
ggsegYan 1.0.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Yan 17-Network 600-Parcel Atlas

Source: R/data.R
yan17_600.Rd

Brain atlas for the Yan et al. (2023) homotopic cortical parcellation with 600 parcels aligned to 17 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains both 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

Usage

yan17_600()

Value

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Yan X, et al. (2023). "Homotopic local-global parcellation of the human cerebral cortex from resting-state functional connectivity." NeuroImage, 273:120010. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2023.120010

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Other cortical_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Examples

yan17_600()
#> 
#> ── yan17_600 ggseg atlas ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 600
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 600 × 3
#>     hemi  region                              label                             
#>     <chr> <chr>                               <chr>                             
#>   1 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_IPL_1         lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_IPL_1    
#>   2 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_IPL_2         lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_IPL_2    
#>   3 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_1          lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_1     
#>   4 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_2          lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_2     
#>   5 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_3          lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_3     
#>   6 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_4          lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_4     
#>   7 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_5          lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_5     
#>   8 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_TempOcc       lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_TempOcc  
#>   9 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_1        lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_1   
#>  10 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_2        lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_2   
#>  11 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_3        lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_3   
#>  12 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_4        lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_4   
#>  13 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_5        lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_5   
#>  14 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_ExStr        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_ExStr   
#>  15 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_IPL_1        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_IPL_1   
#>  16 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_IPL_2        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_IPL_2
